name: marketingskills
description: A collection of marketing skills tailored for AI agents like Claude Code, focusing on conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering to enhance marketing performance.

inputs.name: campaign_data
inputs.description: Marketing campaign metrics and parameters including traffic, conversion rates, and audience segments.

inputs.name: content_text
inputs.description: Text content for copywriting and SEO optimization.

inputs.name: seo_keywords
inputs.description: Target keywords to optimize content for search engines.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Raw data from website analytics to assess marketing outcomes.

inputs.name: growth_strategies
inputs.description: Parameters or plans detailing growth engineering techniques.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: Copywriting output improved for engagement and SEO.

outputs.name: seo_report
outputs.description: Analysis report of SEO effectiveness and recommendations.

outputs.name: conversion_insights
outputs.description: Insights and recommendations to improve conversion rates.

outputs.name: analytics_summary
outputs.description: Summary of marketing analytics with key performance indicators.

steps: Collect and input raw marketing data including campaign metrics, content drafts, SEO keywords, and analytics.
Analyze content_text for SEO performance against seo_keywords.
Generate optimized_content applying copywriting and SEO best practices.
Evaluate campaign_data combined with analytics_data to derive conversion_insights.
Formulate or refine growth_plan using insights and growth_strategies parameters.
Produce comprehensive seo_report and analytics_summary to support decision making.
use_cases: Enhancing digital marketing campaigns via AI-powered copywriting and SEO optimization.
Generating actionable insights from marketing analytics to increase conversion rates.
Developing growth engineering strategies for startups and established businesses.
Automating content creation workflows tailored for various marketing channels.
Tracking and improving marketing performance through continuous data feedback.
patterns: Integration of CRO techniques with AI-driven content optimization
Feedback loops from analytics to iterative marketing strategy refinement
Utilization of keyword analysis for SEO content creation
Data-driven growth engineering applied to marketing campaigns
Automated copywriting based on marketing goals and audience targeting

prompt_templates.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Optimize the following content for SEO using these keywords: {seo_keywords}. Content: {content_text}

prompt_templates.name: conversion_rate_analysis_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze this marketing campaign data to provide conversion rate improvement insights: {campaign_data}

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_development_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Given these analytics and current growth strategies, suggest a detailed growth engineering plan: {analytics_data}, {growth_strategies}

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_improvement_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Improve the following marketing copy to maximize engagement and clarity: {content_text}
